title: Projektmanager:in R&D
required_skills: Several years experience in new product development
Project management and project leadership experience
matched_skills: Project coordination: HSBC programme coordination across product and engineering teams
Communication and presentation skills: C-suite reporting at HSBC
missing_skills: Engineering degree (fundamental requirement — Boru has Management degrees)
New product development experience in hardware/electronics/mechatronics
R&D project management in manufacturing context
core_responsibilities: Drive introduction of high-performance screwing tools from spec to manufacturing to market launch
Define and execute project plans for new product developments
Coordinate cross-functional teams (Product Management, Engineering, Manufacturing, Procurement)
Communicate project status to all project partners
Develop project plans and risk analyses
Build and maintain relationships with global and domestic partners
recommended_emphasis: HSBC programme coordination across product and engineering teams
summary: Score 25.0 (poor match). This R&D Project Manager role is in manufacturing/hardware product development and explicitly requires an engineering degree in Electronics or Mechatronics. Boru has a Management background and no hardware product development experience. The fundamental educational and domain mismatch makes this a poor fit. Not recommended.
